CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR 129. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Continued To Mar-15-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Continued To Feb-15-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Robert Hayden, Esq. for Petitioner: Rochelle Hunter, present as Guardian at litem for: Lashwanda Mongi, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined;
No appearance by Defendant.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees for $1,039.05
Costs $343.75
Medical $ 607
A net balance of $2,510.20 to be depositted into a blocked account with Patelco Credit Union, 142 Second Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
